downloadTitle: Microsoft Purview Information Protection client for Mac
downloadDescription: The Microsoft Purview Information Protection client for Mac is currently in preview and is offered as two separate applications: File Labeler and File Viewer. The Information Protection Scanner and PowerShell module aren't available for Mac.
detailsSection:
The Microsoft Purview Information Protection client for Mac helps you classify and label data in your organization at the time of creation, as well as apply protection, based on encryption and usage rights for sensitive data. Labels, and protection are persistent, traveling with the data throughout its lifecycle, so that it’s detectable and controlled at all times – regardless of where it’s stored or with whom it’s shared – internally or externally.

For more information, see the Microsoft Purview Information Protection site.
Microsoft Purview Information Protection client for Mac in Preview: version 1.0.124
installInstructionSection:
Install the Microsoft Purview Information Protection client- instructions:
Extend sensitivity labeling on Windows

For more information, see our technical documentation.
